chapter_title.ar: بَابُ صَوْمِ الْمُتَمَتِّعِ إِذَا لَمْ يَجِدِ الْهَدْيَ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 191 – The Fasting of the performer of Tumatto when he cannot find (afford) the sacrificial animal

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرفوع - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/199)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرفوع - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/199)
text: هِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ فَمَنْ لَمْ يَجِدْ فَصِيامُ ثَلاثَةِ أَيَّامٍ فِي الْحَجِّ وَ سَبْعَةٍ إِذا رَجَعْتُمْ تِلْكَ عَشَرَةٌ كامِلَةٌ قَالَ كَمَالُهَا كَمَالُ الْأُضْحِيَّةِ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin IBrahimm, from his father, raising it,

‘Regarding the Words of the Mighty and Majestic [2:196] but he who cannot find (any offering) should Fast for three days during the Hajj and for seven days when he returns; these (make) ten (days) complete. Heasws said: ‘Its completion is the completion of the slaughtering’.
en.sarwar: 15. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from in a marfu‘ manner the following: “This is about the words of Allah, most Majestic, most Glorious, ‘If he cannot find (offering) he must fast three days in al-Hajj and seven days when you return and this becomes ten complete.’ [2:196] He (the Imam), ‘Alayhi al-Salam, said that completing fasting is completing the offering obligation.’”
